mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_follows (follower_id, following_id, created_at) VALUES (#{followerId}, #{followingId}, NOW()) ON CONFLICT (follower_id, following_id) DO NOTHING
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM user_follows WHERE follower_id = #{followerId} AND following_id = #{followingId}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM user_follows WHERE follower_id = #{followerId} AND following_id = #{followingId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_follows f1 JOIN user_follows f2 ON f1.following_id = f2.follower_id AND f2.following_id = f1.follower_id WHERE f1.follower_id = #{userIdA}
